commands: if grep -q '^NOVA_ACT_USE_DOCKER=' .env; then sed -i 's/^NOVA_ACT_USE_DOCKER=.*/NOVA_ACT_USE_DOCKER=false/' .env; else echo 'NOVA_ACT_USE_DOCKER=false' >> .env; fi
if grep -q '^NOVA_ACT_TIMEOUT_MS=' .env; then sed -i 's/^NOVA_ACT_TIMEOUT_MS=.*/NOVA_ACT_TIMEOUT_MS=420000/' .env; else echo 'NOVA_ACT_TIMEOUT_MS=420000' >> .env; fi
if grep -q '^NOVA_ACT_MAX_PLANNER_STEPS=' .env; then sed -i 's/^NOVA_ACT_MAX_PLANNER_STEPS=.*/NOVA_ACT_MAX_PLANNER_STEPS=8/' .env; else echo 'NOVA_ACT_MAX_PLANNER_STEPS=8' >> .env; fi
if grep -q '^NOVA_ACT_STEP_TIMEOUT_S=' .env; then sed -i 's/^NOVA_ACT_STEP_TIMEOUT_S=.*/NOVA_ACT_STEP_TIMEOUT_S=75/' .env; else echo 'NOVA_ACT_STEP_TIMEOUT_S=75' >> .env; fi
if grep -q '^NOVA_ACT_STEP_MAX_STEPS=' .env; then sed -i 's/^NOVA_ACT_STEP_MAX_STEPS=.*/NOVA_ACT_STEP_MAX_STEPS=6/' .env; else echo 'NOVA_ACT_STEP_MAX_STEPS=6' >> .env; fi
if grep -q '^NOVA_ACT_LOGIN_MAX_STEPS=' .env; then sed -i 's/^NOVA_ACT_LOGIN_MAX_STEPS=.*/NOVA_ACT_LOGIN_MAX_STEPS=5/' .env; else echo 'NOVA_ACT_LOGIN_MAX_STEPS=5' >> .env; fi

if grep -q '^NOVA_ACT_MAX_CONSECUTIVE_ERRORS=' .env; then sed -i 's/^NOVA_ACT_MAX_CONSECUTIVE_ERRORS=.*/NOVA_ACT_MAX_CONSECUTIVE_ERRORS=2/' .env; else echo 'NOVA_ACT_MAX_CONSECUTIVE_ERRORS=2' >> .env; fi
